objective: Reduce the policy-first polyrepo integration problem into execution-ready per-set PLAN packets without collapsing authority boundaries.
summary: This meta-plan governs the transition from the top-level D0:D5 objective register to narrow, composable PLAN packets for the initial two-repo integration surface. It is a meta-planning layer for the bounded integration canvas spanning ACM and polyrepo_workspace, not an implementation plan for downstream consumer repos. In trimmed archive form, it should be reviewed for internal rigor rather than for the presence of omitted repo surfaces or vendored authorities.

identifier_contract.meta_stage_semantics: Meta-plan stages orchestrate reduction of the D0:D5 objective set; they are not objective ids and do not replace them.

input_objective_register.description: Authoritative pre-existing D0:D5 objective register referenced by the summary and upstream policy-first analysis.

normalized_objective_register.description: Normalized objective register emitted after MP1 derives canonical ordering plus semantic and dependency analysis for the two-repo integration surface.

micro_deliverable_set_register.description: Register of bounded composable sets reduced from the ordered objectives using the normalized register together with semantic and dependency analysis evidence.

stages.title: Fix D0 authority boundary for the two-repo surface
stages.purpose: Freeze the ACM-to-polyrepo_workspace authority boundary, planning mode contract, and bounded integration-canvas scope before ordering any downstream objective.
stages.gate: ACM policy authority, polyrepo_workspace contract authority, and planning mode semantics are explicit

stages.title: Derive canonical objective ordering
stages.purpose: Treat D0:D5 as objectives, then derive canonical ordering for D1:D5 through semantic analysis plus dependency and gap analysis under the ACM/polyrepo_workspace boundary contract.
stages.gate: objective ordering is analysis-derived rather than assumed

stages.title: Reduce objectives into micro-deliverable sets
stages.purpose: Reduce each ordered objective into bounded, composable micro-deliverable sets using the normalized register together with semantic and dependency analysis so acceptance surfaces and authority boundaries remain explicit.
stages.gate: every ordered objective has one or more bounded micro-deliverable sets

stages.title: Run recursive set analysis
stages.purpose: Apply the same semantic, dependency, and gap analysis to each micro-deliverable set until the final analysis layer is stable enough for plan generation.

analysis_artifact_hash_contract.stability_rule: all artifact hashes identical across the two most recent passes for the same set_id set

stages.gate: recursive set analysis stops only when the declared ambiguity and normalized-hash stability contracts are satisfied

stages.title: Generate per-set PLAN packets
stages.purpose: Use the last-round set-analysis artifacts as direct inputs to the PLAN skill and generate one validated PLAN packet per composable set.
stages.gate: each resulting PLAN packet validates through the declared validation authority and remains narrow enough for independent approval

ordering_invariants: D0 is always first because objective ordering depends on the ACM-to-polyrepo_workspace authority boundary, planning mode contract, and bounded integration-canvas contract.
No downstream migration or promotion work can start before semantic ownership, reconciliation, and policy-evaluation closure are reduced into approved micro-deliverable sets.
PLAN packets are downstream artifacts emitted only after recursive analysis stabilizes.
success_condition: The meta-plan is complete when the objective-analysis layer has been reduced into validated per-set PLAN packets with no authority-boundary collapse.
